description_long: This is a small, cylindrical cup with a white base color and a prominent handle on one side. The exterior is decorated with a bold, graphic text design in red and black on a blue background, reading 'I'M THE DADDY.' The cup appears to be made of ceramic or porcelain, giving it a smooth and hard surface. The handle is rounded and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior is plain white, and the cup is open at the top, suitable for holding liquids such as coffee or tea.
description: A small white ceramic cup with a blue, red, and black graphic text design and a rounded handle.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with the handle on the right and partial text visible, mostly showing 'THE' and part of 'DADDY.'
description_view_1: The handle is most prominent on the left, with the text 'I'M DA' partially visible on the front.
description_view_2: The front of the cup displays the full text 'I'M THE DADDY' with the handle on the left side.
description_view_3: The back of the cup shows the text wrapping around, with 'I'M DA' and part of the blue background visible; the handle is not visible.
